villageois.label: Villager
villageois.description: You are a simple villager with no special powers.
villageois.objectif: Your goal: identify and eliminate mafia members and neutral threats.
details: No night action, no ability.
Appears **non-suspicious** to the Sheriff.
Your strength: numbers. Villagers win through deduction and the day vote.

sheriff.label: Sheriff
sheriff.description: You are the Sheriff. Each night, you interrogate a player to find out if they're suspicious.
sheriff.objectif: Your goal: discover mafia members and help the town.
details: **Binary** result: "suspicious" or "not suspicious". You do **not** learn the exact role.
The **Godfather** appears **non-suspicious** (leader immunity). Serial Killers and cultists appear suspicious.
Jester, Survivor and Executioner appear non-suspicious — don't trust innocents blindly.
A **Framer** can make a villager appear suspicious — **only for that night**, the effect doesn't persist.
**One** interrogation per night, locked in on first click. The report arrives in the morning.

INVESTIGATE.label: Interrogate
INVESTIGATE.description: Investigate a player to find out if they're suspicious

docteur.label: Doctor
docteur.description: You are the Doctor. Each night, you heal a player to protect them.
docteur.objectif: Your goal: protect villagers by preventing their elimination.
details: Your heal protects your target from **one** basic attack tonight.
You can heal yourself — but it uses your action for the night.
**Ineffective** against an "unstoppable" attack (Jailor execute).
You get a notification in the morning if your heal mattered.
Healing a revealed Mayor does nothing: once revealed, the Mayor can no longer be healed.

PROTECT.label: Heal
PROTECT.description: Protect a player from an attack tonight

lookout.label: Lookout
lookout.description: You are the Lookout. Each night, you watch a player to see who visits them.
lookout.objectif: Your goal: identify night visitors to help the town.
details: You see the **list of players** who visited your target tonight.
Blocked visitors (roleblock) and already-dead visitors do not appear.
You cannot watch yourself.
Useful to spot the mafia killer or track who visits whom.

LOOKOUT.label: Watch
LOOKOUT.description: Watch a player to see who visits them tonight

vigilante.label: Vigilante
vigilante.description: You are the Vigilante. You can shoot a player at night, but you'll die of guilt if you kill an innocent.
vigilante.objectif: Your goal: eliminate threats to the town by force.
details: **2 bullets max** for the whole game.
**Cannot shoot** on the **first night** — not enough info yet.
If you kill a **town** player, you die of guilt the following night.
Your attack is basic — a Doctor can save your target.
Killing a neutral (Jester, Survivor, Executioner) does **not** trigger guilt.

VIGILANTE_KILL.label: Shoot
VIGILANTE_KILL.description: Shoot a player tonight (careful with innocents!)

maire.label: Mayor
maire.description: You are the Mayor. You can reveal yourself to gain 3 votes, but you can no longer be healed.
maire.objectif: Your goal: use your influence to guide the town.
details: Reveal **during the day only**, once per game.
After revealing: your vote counts as **3** instead of 1.
Once revealed, you become a **priority target** for the mafia and can no longer be healed by the Doctor.
Tradeoff: reveal late for safety, reveal early for impact.

REVEAL.label: Reveal
REVEAL.description: Reveal your Mayor role (3 votes, but no more healing)

escort.label: Escort
escort.description: You are the Escort. Each night, you block a player from using their power.
escort.objectif: Your goal: block enemy powers to protect the town.
details: Prevents the target from **acting tonight** — their action does not resolve.
The roleblock runs **before** all other night actions.
Works on the **Godfather** (he is not roleblock-immune).
Blocking the Jailor prevents the jail from activating.
**Warning:** blocking a Serial Killer can trigger retaliation depending on settings.

ROLEBLOCK.label: Block
ROLEBLOCK.description: Prevent a player from acting tonight

bodyguard.label: Bodyguard
bodyguard.description: You are the Bodyguard. You protect a player at night. If your target is attacked, you kill the attacker but die too.
bodyguard.objectif: Your goal: protect the town at the cost of your life.
details: If your target is attacked, you **intercept**: you kill the attacker and die with them.
Your counter-attack is **powerful** (level 2) — ignores basic immunity.
If no one attacks your target, you survive and return the next night.
You cannot guard yourself.
Only one sacrifice: if several attackers hit the same target, you only take one.

BODYGUARD.label: Protect
BODYGUARD.description: Sacrifice yourself to protect a player and kill their attacker

spy.label: Spy
spy.description: You are the Spy. Each night, you learn who the mafia visited.
spy.objectif: Your goal: infiltrate the mafia to obtain crucial information.
details: You learn **who the mafia visited** tonight (target's name).
You do **not** see Cult or Serial Killer targets.
You do **not** learn mafia identities — only their action.
If the mafia doesn't kill anyone (roleblock, jail...), you get a "no visit" notification.

SPY.label: Spy
SPY.description: Learn who the mafia visited tonight

jailor.label: Jailor
jailor.description: You are the Jailor. You choose a player during the day to jail them at night. You can execute them (3 uses).
jailor.objectif: Your goal: interrogate and eliminate suspects in a controlled manner.
details: You choose your target **during the day**, not at night.
The prisoner is **roleblocked** and **protected** from attacks while in the cell.
You can **execute** them: 3 executions max per game, **unstoppable** attack (ignores doctor, immunity, vest).
You chat **anonymously** with your prisoner at night (they don't see your name).
The prisoner isn't exposed as a mafia target to the Spy since they don't go out.

JAIL.label: Jail
JAIL.description: Jail a player tonight (chosen during the day)

JAILOR_EXECUTE.label: Execute
JAILOR_EXECUTE.description: Execute the prisoner tonight (3 uses max)

godfather.label: Godfather
godfather.description: You are the Godfather. You lead the mafia and appear non-suspicious to the Sheriff.
godfather.objectif: Your goal: eliminate everyone who opposes the mafia.
details: **Unique**: only one Godfather per game.
**Basic night immunity**: you survive level-1 attacks (Vigilante, Mafioso, SK).
Appears **non-suspicious** to the Sheriff — you blend in with the town.
The **Consigliere** still sees your real role.
You can be **roleblocked** by the Escort and **jailed** by the Jailor.

KILL.label: Kill
KILL.description: Order the elimination of a player tonight

mafioso.label: Mafioso
mafioso.description: You are the mafia's enforcer. You carry out the Godfather's orders.
mafioso.objectif: Your goal: eliminate everyone who opposes the mafia.
details: You kill **one target per night** (coordinated with the rest of the mafia in chat).
Appears **suspicious** to the Sheriff — unlike the Godfather.
Basic attack: a Doctor or Bodyguard can save your target.
No night immunity: a basic attack can kill you.

KILL.label: Kill
KILL.description: Kill a player tonight on mafia's orders

framer.label: Framer
framer.description: You are the Framer. You can make a player appear suspicious to the Sheriff.
framer.objectif: Your goal: sow confusion to protect the mafia.
details: Your target appears **suspicious** to the Sheriff — **for this night only**.
You do **not** change the target's real role or permanent status: the effect fades by morning.
The **Consigliere** still sees the target's **real** role — you can't fool them.
Perfect for framing a villager when a Sheriff is known or suspected.
You appear **suspicious** to the Sheriff yourself.

FRAME.label: Frame
FRAME.description: Make a player appear suspicious to the Sheriff (1 night)

blackmailer.label: Blackmailer
blackmailer.description: You are the Blackmailer. You can prevent a player from speaking the next day.
blackmailer.objectif: Your goal: silence threats to the mafia.
details: Your target **cannot send messages** in public chat the following day.
They can still **vote**, **act** and read the chat — only sending messages is blocked.
Effect lasts **one day** — the gag lifts at the following night.
Great for muting a Sheriff about to share their findings.

BLACKMAIL.label: Blackmail
BLACKMAIL.description: Prevent a player from speaking the next day

consigliere.label: Consigliere
consigliere.description: You are the Consigliere. You can discover the exact role of a player.
consigliere.objectif: Your goal: provide valuable information to the mafia.
details: You learn the **exact role** of your target (not just "suspicious / not suspicious").
The **Framer cannot fool you**: you always see the real role.
**One** target per night, locked in on first click.
You cannot investigate a fellow mafia member — they're already known to you.
You appear **suspicious** to the Sheriff.

INVESTIGATE_ROLE.label: Investigate
INVESTIGATE_ROLE.description: Discover the exact role of a player

serial_killer.label: Serial Killer
serial_killer.description: You are the Serial Killer, a lone killer. You eliminate a player each night. You have night immunity.
serial_killer.objectif: Your goal: be the last one standing.
details: Kill **one target per night**, starting on night one.
**Night immunity**: you survive all basic attacks (mafia, vigilante).
Appears **suspicious** to the Sheriff.
**Unstoppable** on your target: your attack still kills through a Doctor (only the Bodyguard intercepts).
You win if you're the last one alive — or only other neutrals remain with you.

jester.label: Jester
jester.description: You are the Jester. You want to get lynched by the town. You have no powers.
jester.objectif: Your goal: get yourself lynched by the town.
details: **No night action**. No offensive or defensive ability.
You win **only** if you are **lynched at trial** — dying at night doesn't count.
Appears **non-suspicious** to the Sheriff — perfect for looking innocent… or *too* innocent.
Play just suspicious enough to trigger a vote against you.

survivor.label: Survivor
survivor.description: You are the Survivor. You just want to stay alive. You have a limited bulletproof vest.
survivor.objectif: Your goal: survive until the end of the game.
details: You win if you are **alive at the end**, no matter which team wins.
**3 bulletproof vests** total: one use per night, blocks one basic attack.
The vest does not protect against an unstoppable attack (Jailor, Serial Killer hitting you).
Appears **non-suspicious** to the Sheriff — use it to survive the vote.
No offensive actions: you can only protect yourself.

VEST.label: Vest
VEST.description: Put on a bulletproof vest for tonight (3 uses max)

executioner.label: Executioner
executioner.description: You are the Executioner. You have a secret town target that you must get lynched.
executioner.objectif: Your goal: get your target lynched by the town.
details: A **secret target** (a town player) is revealed to you at game start.
You win if your target is **lynched at trial** — not killed at night.
**Night immunity** + **basic defense**: hard to eliminate.
If your target dies **another way** (night, other vote), you automatically become **Jester**.
Appears **non-suspicious** to the Sheriff.

cultist.label: Cultist
cultist.description: You belong to the Cult. You see the other cultists and can chat with them at night. Each cultist votes for a conversion target: the conversion only happens if every cultist votes for the same person. If votes disagree, nobody is converted that night.
cultist.objectif: Your goal: convert enough villagers so the Cult dominates the game.
details: You see the other cultists and chat with them in a private night channel.
Conversion: **all** living cultists must vote the **same target**. Divergent votes = no conversion.
The converted target joins the Cult **in the morning** and gains access to the cult chat.
Cultists **cannot** convert a mafia or Serial Killer player.
Appears **suspicious** to the Sheriff.
The Cult wins when it equals or outnumbers the rest of the living players.

CULT_VOTE.label: Convert
CULT_VOTE.description: Vote to convert this target tonight. Conversion only happens if every cultist votes for the same target.
